name: Tuning Car Racing
author: Poki
description: Tuning Car Racing is an urban racing game packed with speed and variety! Explore a huge city, test 8 unique cars, and compete across 6 exciting racing maps with multiple variations. Feel the rush of high-speed competition as you race through vibrant streets and push your driving skills to the limit. Ready to tune, race, and rule the city roads? How to play Tuning Car Racing? Speed Up: W or the up arrow key Brake: S or the down arrow key Turn: A/D or left and right arrow keys Handbrake: the space bar Who created Tuning Car Racing? Tuning Car Racing is created by Process Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Tuning Car Racing for free? You can play Tuning Car Racing for free on Poki. Can I play Tuning Car Racing on mobile devices and desktop? Tuning Car Racing can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
